title: Endoscopy Technicians
description: Maintain a sterile field to provide support for physicians and nurses during endoscopy procedures. Prepare and maintain instruments and equipment. May obtain specimens.

tasks.text: Clean, disinfect, or calibrate scopes or other endoscopic instruments according to manufacturer recommendations and facility standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect specimens from patients, using standard medical procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform safety checks to verify proper equipment functioning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist physicians or registered nurses in the conduct of endoscopic procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place devices, such as blood pressure cuffs, pulse oximeter sensors, nasal cannulas, surgical cautery pads, and cardiac monitoring electrodes, on patients to monitor vital signs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare suites or rooms according to endoscopic procedure requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain inventories of endoscopic equipment and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend in-service training to validate or refresh basic professional skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct in-service training sessions to disseminate information regarding equipment or instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position or transport patients in accordance with instructions from medical personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read current literature, talk with colleagues, or participate in professional organizations or conferences to keep abreast of developments in endoscopy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
